summary: Elric, a Merbinger and friend of the Eastern General, arrives at the temple with an ice crystal to give to the God of Camellias. He explains that this is part of an arrangement made by his ancestors to prevent a catastrophic event, but the God of Daffodils, Dafo, is skeptical and questions Elric's motives. The two engage in a conversation about their pasts and the reason for Elric's visit.
key_moments: Elric arrives at the temple with an ice crystal
Elric explains the arrangement made by his ancestors
